top_tweets.text:
This is really accurate. 

As much as we all want to drink the vibe coding kool-aid, the reality is that 90%+ of all code in a company is maintaining and migrating existing stuff that is complicated and messy. You can definitely vibe code the remaining 10% but unless there is a
top_tweets.author: chamath
top_tweets.name: Chamath Palihapitiya
top_tweets.summary_zh: 引用推文指出「vibe coding 週末做出來」的說法忽略了現實：企業 90% 以上的程式碼都是在維護與遷移複雜且混亂的既有系統，vibe coding 只能處理剩下的 10% 新功能開發。這點出 AI 工具在實際產品環境中的侷限。

context.quoted_text:
Every time I see a tweet saying “I can vibe code this in a weekend” - I think of the slack notification system..

It takes time, persistence and effort to get the details right. 

Sure, a lot of simple workflows will get vibe coded away. And maybe you can put this in Claude Code and get the code right in one shot. 

But quality, depth and great systems will still have value and take time. You can’t vibe code lessons. 

Now and forever.

top_tweets.text:
New course: Spec-Driven Development with Coding Agents, built in partnership with @jetbrains, and taught by @paulweveritt.

Vibe coding is fast, but often produces code that doesn't match what you asked for. This short course teaches you spec-driven development: write a detailed https://t.co/M9zaNg2aTb
top_tweets.author: AndrewYNg
top_tweets.name: Andrew Ng
top_tweets.summary_zh: Andrew Ng 推出新課程「Spec-Driven Development with Coding Agents」，強調 vibe coding 雖快但常無法產出符合需求的程式碼，教導開發者先寫清晰的規格文件再讓 AI 執行。

top_tweets.text:
Vibe coding is fast. It’s also unpredictable. Spec-driven development is the alternative: define what to build in a clear spec, then let your coding agent implement it.

In our new spec-tacular short course with @JetBrains and @JetBrains_Edu, you’ll learn how to:

⚙️ Write https://t.co/YmxddH9pLI
top_tweets.author: DeepLearningAI
top_tweets.name: DeepLearning.AI
top_tweets.summary_zh: DeepLearningAI 與 JetBrains 合作推出 spec-driven development 短課程，主張先定義清楚的規格再交由 AI 實作，以解決 vibe coding 不可預測的問題。此推文與上一則呼應同一課程。

top_tweets.text:
OpenAI offered $3 billion for Windsurf. Google paid $2.4 billion for the CEO and top researchers. Cognition picked up the remaining company, the IDE, the product, 350 enterprise customers, and $82M ARR, for roughly $250 million.

That $250 million just became the best deal in AI
top_tweets.author: aakashgupta
top_tweets.name: Aakash Gupta
top_tweets.summary_zh: Cognition 以約 2.5 億美元收購 Windsurf 剩餘公司（含 IDE 產品與 350 家企業客戶、8200 萬美元 ARR），相較 OpenAI 的 30 億報價與 Google 的 24 億挖角，這筆交易被視為 AI 領域最划算的收購案。

context.quoted_text:
Introducing Windsurf 2.0.

Manage all your agents from one place and delegate work to the cloud with Devin - so your agents keep shipping even after you close your laptop. https://t.co/HPdGeosKM0

top_tweets.text:
🚨PERPLEXITY JUST LAUNCHED SOMETHING THAT MAKES EVERY OTHER AI PRODUCT LOOK LIKE A TOY.. AND NOBODY IS TALKING ABOUT IT..

They built a Personal Computer.. Not an app.. Not a chatbot.. A full digital worker that runs 24/7 on a Mac mini even while you sleep..

You press both https://t.co/Bxg4D5nQIu
top_tweets.author: EvanLuthra
top_tweets.name: Evan Luthra
top_tweets.summary_zh: Perplexity 推出「Personal Computer」功能，這是一個在 Mac mini 上 24/7 運行的數位工作者，能與本地檔案、原生 App 和瀏覽器整合，開放給所有 Max 訂閱用戶使用。

context.quoted_text:
Today we're releasing Personal Computer.

Personal Computer integrates with the Perplexity Mac App for secure orchestration across your local files, native apps, and browser.

We’re rolling this out to all Perplexity Max subscribers and everyone on the waitlist starting today.

top_tweets.text:
Interesting shift: AI agents are no longer just tools.

They’re becoming a new class of digital users with their own logic, tradeoffs, and decision paths.

That means product teams can’t rely on human intuition alone anymore.

@AvokoAI’s approach of interviewing agent respondents
top_tweets.author: Ronycoder
top_tweets.name: Rony
top_tweets.summary_zh: AI agents 不再只是工具，而是成為具有自身邏輯與決策路徑的新型數位使用者。產品團隊不能再單靠人類直覺，Avoko AI 的做法是直接訪談 agent 受訪者以理解其行為。

top_tweets.text:
1 million business customers: the fastest-growing business platform in history: what it means for AI product UX.

https://t.co/hWoYKUabEF
top_tweets.author: montana_labs
top_tweets.name: Montana Labs
top_tweets.summary_zh: Montana Labs 分享史上成長最快的商業平台達成 100 萬企業客戶的里程碑，並探討這對 AI 產品 UX 設計的意義。

top_tweets.text:
This is an interesting angle.

If agents are becoming real users, then product research can’t stay human-only.

Avoko is built around understanding how agents actually behave through AI-to-AI interviews, which feels very relevant right now.

https://t.co/OOFNDsQaO2
top_tweets.author: AIwithArsalan
top_tweets.name: Arsalan
top_tweets.summary_zh: 如果 agents 成為真實使用者，產品研究就不能只針對人類。Avoko 透過 AI 對 AI 訪談來理解 agents 的實際行為，這個角度在當前環境下很有意義。

top_tweets.text:
We’re hiring a Product Designer at @doist!
Shape productivity tools across every platform.
We’re looking for someone who cares deeply about craft and embraces AI in their work.
Fully async and remote 👋🏼 Let's chat! https://t.co/YsRODtZTuE https://t.co/SiadkGDNnH
top_tweets.author: alexmuench
top_tweets.name: Alex 🌚
top_tweets.summary_zh: Doist 徵求 Product Designer，職位涵蓋所有平台的生產力工具設計，特別強調重視工藝細節並在工作中善用 AI，採完全遠端非同步協作。

top_tweets.text:
Turned raw ring photos into a full luxury campaign using AI.

Took basic ring photos → rebuilt → turned into a luxury campaign.

Same product, completely different perception.

That’s what positioning does.

High-quality visuals below ↓ https://t.co/w7vRpKimqt
top_tweets.author: zazzygfx
top_tweets.name: Zazzy
top_tweets.summary_zh: 使用 AI 將基礎戒指產品照片重建為奢華品牌形象視覺，展示了相同產品透過不同視覺定位可以創造完全不同的感知價值。

criteria.score_formula: likes（主要）+ Claude 人工過濾廣告/招聘/meme/非設計
claude_filter_rules: 排除純廣告、招聘文（有洞見的 JD 除外）
排除與產品設計/PM 無關（crypto、體育、政治等）
排除 meme/搞笑但無內容
偏好有觀點的原創內容

top_products.title: Splitt
top_products.author: Zack P
top_products.tagline: Track your workout from your lock screen and Dynamic Island
top_products.summary_zh: 可從 iPhone 鎖定畫面和 Dynamic Island 直接追蹤健身訓練進度的工具，方便使用者在運動時快速記錄。

top_products.title: Foyer
top_products.author: Sohazur
top_products.tagline: Make your site speak and sell
top_products.summary_zh: 為網站添加語音互動功能的工具，讓訪客能透過聲音與網站內容互動並完成購買行為。

top_products.title: HackerEarth OnScreen
top_products.author: Zahra K
top_products.tagline: An always-on, zero-bias AI hiring tool
top_products.summary_zh: 採用 AI 技術的招募工具，提供持續運作且無偏見的候選人評估機制，適合企業人資部門使用。

top_products.title: Google Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS
top_products.author: Rohan Chaubey
top_products.tagline: Text-to-speech API with natural language voice direction
top_products.summary_zh: Google 推出的文字轉語音 API，支援使用自然語言指令來控制語音風格與呈現方式。

top_products.title: TaskShell
top_products.author: Fred A.
top_products.tagline: A terminal/IDE-inspired task manager that keeps you in flow
top_products.summary_zh: 採用終端機與 IDE 介面風格設計的任務管理工具，協助開發者與進階使用者維持工作專注流程。

top_products.title: LISA Core
top_products.author: Amar Dahmani
top_products.tagline: LLM memory using semantic compression for AI conversations
top_products.summary_zh: 透過語意壓縮技術為 LLM 提供記憶功能，讓 AI 對話能保留並運用過往互動脈絡。
